name: Dietrich Bonhoeffer
title: Theologian & Martyr
bio: German Lutheran pastor, theologian, and anti-Nazi dissident. Author of 'The Cost of Discipleship' and 'Life Together.' Executed by the Nazis at Flossenbürg concentration camp.
faith: Bonhoeffer's theology of 'costly grace' challenged cheap Christianity. He helped found the Confessing Church in opposition to Nazi influence and participated in a plot to assassinate Hitler. His final words were, 'This is the end — for me, the beginning of life.'

sources.title: Dietrich Bonhoeffer — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the theologian-martyr executed by the Nazis

sources.title: The Cost of Discipleship
sources.note: By Dietrich Bonhoeffer. His influential work on 'costly grace' versus 'cheap grace'

sources.title: Bonhoeffer: Pastor, Martyr, Prophet, Spy
sources.note: By Eric Metaxas. Bestselling biography of Bonhoeffer's life and faith

tagline: Gave his life resisting tyranny for the sake of the gospel
